calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lawrence Bugg, Director of Future State University, Inc., Appellant/Depfendant, with witness Regina Bugg, who is also present.
Yiren Tan, appearing for Respondent/Plaintiffs.

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Yiren Tan, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Package of Email Correspondence

Lawrence Bugg, Director of Future State University, Inc., testifies on behalf of Appellant/Depfendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Judgment Entered
